title: First Graduate Certificate
description: A First Graduate Certificate is an official document that certifies an individual as the first person in their family to graduate from college. This certificate is often required to avail of specific educational benefits, scholarships, and fee concessions.

title: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme
titleUpper: INDIRA GANDHI OLD AGE PENSION SHEME
description: The Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme provides financial assistance to elderly individuals living below the poverty line. It aims to provide social security and support for senior citizens.
documentsRequired: Applicant Photo|Applicant Aadhar Card|Smart Card|Age Proof Certificate|Income Certificate

title: Income Certificate
description: An Income Certificate is an official statement provided by the state government confirming the annual income of a person or a family. It is generally required to claim scholarships or fee concessions.
documentsRequired: Applicant Photo|Applicant Aadhar Card|Smart Card|Salary Slip / IT Return

title: Deserted Woman Certificate
description: This certificate is issued to women who have been deserted by their husbands, to help them avail various welfare schemes and financial assistance from the government.
documentsRequired: Applicant Photo|Applicant Aadhar Card|Smart Card|Marriage Certificate|FIR or Legal Document showing desertion|Applicant Signature

title: Inter-caste Marriage certificate
description: Certificate for inter-caste marriages, required for government benefits and incentives.
documentsRequired: Applicant Photo|Applicant Aadhar Card|Spouse Aadhar Card|Marriage Registration Certificate|Community Certificates of both

title: Family Migration Certificate
description: Issued when a family relocates to a new region, useful for transferring benefits and registrations.
documentsRequired: Head of Family Photo|Aadhar Cards of all members|Smart Card|Proof of New Address

title: Other Backward Classes (OBC) Certificate
description: Proof of belonging to the OBC category for educational and employment reservations.
documentsRequired: Applicant Photo|Applicant Aadhar Card|Smart Card|School TC|Parent's Community Certificate

title: Widow Certificate
description: Provides financial aid and welfare scheme eligibility for widowed women.
documentsRequired: Applicant Photo|Applicant Aadhar Card|Smart Card|Husband's Death Certificate|Legal Heir Certificate

title: No Male Child Certificate
description: Required for specific welfare schemes for families with only female children.
documentsRequired: Parents Photo|Aadhar Cards of Parents|Smart Card|Birth Certificates of Children

title: Community Certificate
description: Official proof of one's caste or community for reservation benefits.
documentsRequired: Applicant Photo|Applicant Aadhar Card|Smart Card|School TC or Parent's Certificate

title: Nativity Certificate
description: Certifies that a person has been residing in a specific state for a minimum required period.
documentsRequired: Applicant Photo|Applicant Aadhar Card|Smart Card|Birth Certificate|Property Tax / EB Bill

title: Unemployment Certificate
description: Issued to educated unemployed youth for government aid and special schemes.
documentsRequired: Applicant Photo|Applicant Aadhar Card|Employment Exchange ID|Educational Certificates

title: PAN Card Application
description: Apply for a new Permanent Account Number (PAN) card for financial transactions and tax purposes.
documentsRequired: Applicant Photo|Applicant Aadhar Card|Signature

title: Voter ID Registration
description: Register as a new voter and obtain an Electoral Photo Identity Card (EPIC).
documentsRequired: Applicant Photo|Applicant Aadhar Card|Address Proof

title: Aadhaar Card Update
description: Update demographic or biometric details on your existing Aadhaar Card.
documentsRequired: Existing Aadhar Card|Valid Supporting Document for Update

title: Smart Card Services
description: Apply for a new family Smart Card or make corrections to an existing one.
documentsRequired: Head of Family Photo|Aadhar Cards of all members|Address Proof

title: Account Opening
description: Open a new savings or current bank account quickly and securely.
documentsRequired: Applicant Photo|Applicant Aadhar Card|PAN Card|Initial Deposit Amount

title: Money Transfer
description: Securely transfer money to any bank account across the country.
documentsRequired: Sender Aadhar/ID|Recipient Account Details

title: Loan Application
description: Apply for personal, agricultural, or business loans with competitive rates.
documentsRequired: Applicant Photo|Applicant Aadhar Card|PAN Card|Income Proof / IT Returns|Bank Statements|Property Documents (if applicable)

title: Cash Withdrawal
description: Withdraw cash easily using Micro-ATM and AePS services.
